channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Brazil's President Signs Bill Restricting Smartphone Use at School
item.description: Brazil's President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva has signed a bill restricting the use of smartphones at school, following a global trend for such limitations.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE and DIARLEI RODRIGUES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Joe Biden’s new chip export rules strangle competition to ensure U.S. AI supremacy
item.description: America, a country built on the principle of free markets, has decided to shut off around 120 countries from accessing the most valuable element that is powering the free market at present.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Why the Biden administration is proposing new rules for exporting AI chips
item.description: The Biden administration is proposing a new framework for the exporting of the advanced computer chips used to develop artificial intelligence, an attempt to balance national security concerns about the technology with the economic interests of producers and other countries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: 5-minute cleanup for your phone and computer
item.description: Technology expert Kim Komando shares her easy tips on how to declutter your phones, computers and devices from the files you no longer need.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft plans to force-install its new Outlook app on Windows 10 PCs
item.description: Microsoft plans to force-install its new Outlook client on Windows 10 computers in conjunction with a new security update being released Feb. 11, according to Bleeping Computer. The change affects Microsoft 365 users and the new Outlook client will run alongside the classic Outlook app.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Lasers help archaeologists study ancient tattoos on Peruvian mummies
item.description: Researchers have used lasers to uncover highly intricate designs of ancient tattoos on mummies from Peru.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Red Hat completes Neural Magic acquisition
item.description: Jan. 13, 2025 update: Red Hat announced it has completed its acquisition of Neural Magic, a pioneer in software and algorithms that accelerate gen AI inference workloads. Red Hat first announced its intent to acquire the company on Nov. 12, 2024. Today’s announcement confirms the close of the deal.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft’s Project Phoenix could make Edge look better than ever in Windows 11 – but I’m not sure it’s enough to take the fight to Google Chrome
item.description: Microsoft’s apparent grand plan to improve Edge could see the browser morphing to match your Windows 11 environment.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tech giants join forces to better support Chromium-based browsers
item.description: The Linux Foundation has unveiled a new collaborative organization called Supporters of Chromium-Based Browsers designed to ensure that open-source projects with connections to Chromium get the necessary resources to be successful.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple’s packed 2025 iPhone and iPad roadmap just got tipped
item.description: Release windows for everything from the iPhone SE 4 to the iPhone 17 Air have been tipped by reliable reporter Mark Gurman.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Steve Bannon says he will 'take down' the 'truly evil' Elon Musk
item.description: President-elect Trump’s former adviser Steve Bannon has vowed to “take down” tech billionaire Elon Musk, calling him “truly evil.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: AI is changing the way we grieve and perceive death
item.description: Imagine attending a funeral where the person who has died speaks directly to you, answering your questions and sharing memories. This happened at the funeral of Marina Smith, a Holocaust educator who died in 2022.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: PowerSchool data breach exposes millions of student and teacher records
item.description: PowerSchool, which serves over 60 million students and teachers globally, has become the latest target of cybercriminals. Millions of records were stolen.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China’s newest humanoid robot is ready to serve like never before
item.description: A Chinese company has developed a new bipedal humanoid robot that stands over 5 feet tall and can tackle a wide range of tasks in different settings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese auto giant wants to make flying cars your next commute option
item.description: An automotive maker in China has developed a flying car that is setting the stage for a new era in how we think about commuting and connectivity in cities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: PowerSchool hack exposes Indiana students' data
item.description: BROWNSBURG, Ind. -- Multiple Indianapolis area school corporations confirmed an unauthorized user accessed its student information system as part of a national data breach.
item.dc:creator: Tyler Haughn, NewsNation

item.title: Meta tries letting Facebook Marketplace users view eBay listings as way to resolve EU charges
item.description: Meta said Wednesday that it will allow some Facebook users to view eBay listings on its Marketplace service, as it tries out a possible way to resolve European Union charges of anticompetitive behavior that the bloc leveled last year.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Meta rolls back hate speech rules as Zuckerberg cites 'recent elections' as a catalyst
item.description: It wasn't just fact-checking that Meta scrapped from its platforms as it prepares for the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Federal News Network’s AI & Data Exchange 2025
item.description: AI in action: How agencies are building out trusted artificial intelligence capabilities The post Federal News Network’s AI & Data Exchange 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Federal cyber leaders on building national resilience
item.description: How are you building resilience into your agency’s cybersecurity? The post Federal cyber leaders on building national resilience first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Examining disk space on Linux
item.description: There are many ways to evaluate disk space usage on Linux, and this post examines a number of commands that allow you to view used and available disk space.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: When it comes to innovation and the technology to drive it, few companies today rival Nvidia. The company has leveraged its GPU expertise to become a dominant player in the AI market. Nvidia’s GPU pedigree dates back decades to high-powered processors originally built for gaming systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: ByteDance's Lemon8 gains traction amid TikTok ban threat as creators push the app
item.description: Hearing a lot about Lemon8 lately? You’re not the only one. Amid a looming U.S. ban on TikTok, content creators have been pushing the platform's sister app.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oracle offers price-performance boost with Exadata X11M update
item.description: The new version of Oracle’s Exadata platform, X11M, is now generally available, and promises improved performance on generative AI tasks such as retrieval augmented generation (RAG) for the same price as the old version.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Japan links Chinese hacker MirrorFace to dozens of cyberattacks targeting security and tech data
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan on Wednesday linked more than 200 cyberattacks over the past five years targeting the country's national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace, detailing their tactics and calling on government agencies and businesses to reinforce preventive meas
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI detects ovarian cancer better than human doctors: Study
item.description: AI based models achieved an accuracy rate of 86% for detecting ovarian cancer, compared to 82% for human experts.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: White House new cyber EO would give CISA more authorities
item.description: The White House is prepping a new cybersecurity executive order that would address cloud security, give CISA new authorities to do threat hunting and more. The post White House new cyber EO would give CISA more authorities first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: How adding capacity to a network could reduce IT costs
item.description: Finding an enterprise looking to spend more on network equipment is like finding gold while digging for worms for bait. Cost management used to be an option in enhancing profits, but these days it’s a mantra.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta's new board includes UFC boss Dana White, a familiar figure in Trump's orbit
item.description: Meta has appointed three new members to its board of directors, including Dana White, the president and CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship and a familiar figure in the orbit of incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
